New Project Support under TUBITAK Career Development Program

Prof. Dr. Berna Arslan Uzundağ from the Department of Psychology, Faculty of Economics, Administrative and Social Sciences. Prof. Dr. Berna Arslan Uzundağ’s project proposal titled “Cognitive Development in Infancy and Early Childhood: Development of Language, Attention and Executive Functions” has been entitled to be supported under the TÜBİTAK ARDEB 3501 Career Development Program. The primary aim of this thirty-month study is to investigate whether socioeconomic level affects language and executive functions in early childhood through attention control skills in infancy.
